plans.intent: Exercise required scenario 'arbiter_reset' and bind any marker to observed DUT state.
Exercise required scenario 'arbiter_single_req0' and bind any marker to observed DUT state.
Exercise required scenario 'arbiter_single_req1' and bind any marker to observed DUT state.
Exercise required scenario 'arbiter_both_requests' and bind any marker to observed DUT state.
Exercise harder scenario 'arbiter_no_req_idle' after required behavior is stable.
Exercise harder scenario 'arbiter_alternating_grants_with_both_req' after required behavior is stable.
Exercise harder scenario 'arbiter_req0_drops_while_req1_stays' after required behavior is stable.
Exercise harder scenario 'arbiter_priority_wraparound' after required behavior is stable.
Drive edge condition 'arbiter_no_req_idle' and check relevant assertion activation.
Drive edge condition 'arbiter_both_requests' and check relevant assertion activation.
Drive edge condition 'arbiter_alternating_grants_with_both_req' and check relevant assertion activation.
Drive edge condition 'arbiter_req0_drops_while_req1_stays' and check relevant assertion activation.
Drive edge condition 'arbiter_priority_wraparound' and check relevant assertion activation.
